name: Aysheen Maana
overview: The Abu Anas family decides to move to a residential compound in Riyadh. But they're not like any ordinary new residents. They're strangers. They're different. They've come from the world of the "jinn" to carry out a mission...

trailers.title: مسلسل عايشين معانا l الإعلان الرسمي l شاهد
